title: Visium Direct Mount Fresh Frozen -- University of Minnesota TMCs
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"ofle","text":"The Visium Spatial Gene Expression Solution measures the total mRNA in tissue sections and requires a Visium Spatial slide with intact tissue sections as input. This protocol outlines methanol fixation, Hematoxylin \u0026 Eosin (H\u0026E) staining, and imaging of tissue for use with 10x Genomics Visium Spatial protocols. Fixed and stained tissue sections are inputs for the downstream Visium Spatial Tissue Optimization and Visium Spatial Gene Expression workflows.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"386og","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"76u66","text":"Tissue sections are processed with Visium Spatial Gene Expression assay performed by the University of Minnesota Imaging Center and sequenced by the University of Minnesota Genomics Center.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: CG000238 Rev E 10x FF Visium Spatial Tissue Optimization.pdf
CG000160 Rev C 10x FF Visium Methanol Fixation and HE Staining.pdf
CG000239 RevF 10x FF Visium Spatial Gene Expression User Guide.pdf Illumina NovaSeq 6000 with read format 28/10/10/90
